_audit_note: Hand-audited 2026-07-12 against the pinned trees (superbot-next@2c62a099, superbot@b2b7fe0c) by reading each flagged cite's context; rule-a and rule-b cover EVERY unique (doc,path) pair flagged by the audit variant g1-loose|keep|all-md|suffix; rule-c is an explicitly stated deterministic sample (sorted pairs, fixed stride, n=15) of a 548-pair population. verdict semantics: true-catch = the cite as written misleads a reader of THIS repo at THIS SHA (file absent from tree / content moved); false-positive = the cite is not a defect a red gate should stop (cross-repo reference clear from context, library path, deliberate mention of an absent path, grammar artifact, boundary noise).
